# setSubtaps(_:)

**Instance Method**

Set the subtaps property.

## Declaration

```swift
func setSubtaps(_ taps: [AudioHardwareTap]) throws
```

## Parameters

- **taps**: An array of AudioHardwareTaps representing all the taps to include in the aggregate device.
title: setSubtaps(_:)
